skills.name: adr
skills.description: Create an Architecture Decision Record in docs/decisions/ and optionally sync to Confluence for business projects. Use when making significant technical decisions. Triggers on: architecture decision, ADR, technical decision.

skills.name: app-insights
skills.description: Query Azure Application Insights logs using KQL via the az CLI (Log Analytics workspace backend). Use this skill whenever you need to investigate production events, debug application behavior, search custom events, analyze error patterns, or gather telemetry evidence. Triggers on: application insights, app insights, KQL, custom events, telemetry, production logs, event analysis, debugging events, Properties, AppEvents, AppExceptions, AppRequests, orders, deliveries. This skill is essential for troubleshooting agents and any agent doing research on production behavior — use it even if the user just says "check the logs", "what happened in prod", or "look up events for order X".

skills.name: brainstorm
skills.description: Ask one question at a time to develop a thorough, step-by-step spec for an idea. Iterative discovery leading to a spec.md and optional GitHub repo. Triggers on: brainstorm, explore idea, spec out, think through.

skills.name: clusters
skills.description: Multi-cluster reference data for troubleshooting across EMEA, APAC, NAM. Contains kubectl contexts, ArgoCD cluster names, and Log Analytics workspace details per region. Auto-loaded by the troubleshooter agent.

skills.name: k8s
skills.description: Kubernetes operations skill with kubectl access scoped to the logged-in user's RBAC permissions. Verifies auth before any operation. Supports multi-cluster contexts (EMEA/APAC/NAM). Use for: kubectl, pods, deploy, scale, logs, k8s, kubernetes, cluster, namespace, rollout, restart.

skills.name: opensearch-logs
skills.description: Search OpenSearch logs via Kibana/OpenSearch Dashboards proxy for troubleshooting and debugging. Use when the user asks to search logs, check errors, investigate issues, or troubleshoot services. Covers index discovery, log queries, aggregations, and tail-like workflows. Requires curl and jq.

skills.name: pipeline-github-feature
skills.description: GitHub feature development pipeline. Run from CLI: ai-native-workflow run github-feature [specs-file] specs.md/input → requirements-engineer → GitHub issue → architect → tdd-developer → qa → reviewer → PR.

skills.name: pipeline-gitlab-feature
skills.description: GitLab feature development pipeline. Run from CLI: ai-native-workflow run gitlab-feature <JIRA-ID> Jira → requirements-engineer → qa (test plan) → architect → tdd-developer → qa → reviewer → MR.

skills.name: pipeline-gitlab-incident
skills.description: GitLab incident response pipeline. Run from CLI: ai-native-workflow run gitlab-incident <JIRA-ID> Jira → troubleshooter → user decides (document or fix) → tdd-developer → qa → reviewer → MR.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Entry point for all new work. Orchestrates the full agent pipeline: architect designs spec+todo, tdd-developer implements via TDD, qa runs tests, reviewer reviews code. Triggers on: plan, new feature, start work, build feature.

skills.name: pr
skills.description: Create a pull request (GitHub) or merge request (GitLab) with conventional description, test summary, and checklist. Auto-detects platform. Triggers on: create pr, create mr, pull request, merge request, push and pr.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Review code for security vulnerabilities focusing on OWASP Top 10, injection attacks, authentication flaws, and data exposure. Triggers on: security review, vulnerability check, audit code, pentest.

skills.name: session-report
skills.description: Generate an Obsidian session report at the end of a coding session. Summarizes commits, tests, decisions, blockers, and next steps. Triggers on: end session, session report, wrap up, done for today.

skills.name: skip-tdd
skills.description: Temporarily bypass the TDD commit gate. Use for documentation changes, CI/CD config, dependency updates, or hotfixes. Logs the reason for accountability. Bypass auto-clears after the next commit. Triggers on: skip tdd, bypass tests, no-tdd.

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: Strict test-driven development workflow. Use when implementing any feature, bug fix, or code change. Follows RED → GREEN → REFACTOR cycle with stack-aware test runner detection. Triggers on: implement, build, create, add feature, fix bug, write code for.

skills.name: ticket
skills.description: Pull a Jira issue and scaffold a feature spec with test stubs. Use when starting work on a new Jira ticket or GitHub issue. Reads acceptance criteria, description, and comments. Requires Jira MCP server for Jira tickets. Triggers on: ticket, issue, PROJ-*, start work on, pick up.

skills.name: customize-cloud-agent
skills.description: Skill for customizing the Copilot cloud agent (formerly known as Copilot coding agent) environment, including copilot-setup-steps.yml configuration, preinstalling tools and dependencies, runners, and settings.
